steps.title: Track the action and result
steps.content: The first sentence says a tiger opens its mouth after detecting another animal's scent. The next sentence explains what that same action allows: the scent reaches receptors on the roof of the mouth.

steps.title: Signal how the result happens
steps.content: A signals a time shift, while B and C signal contrast. The relationship is not time or contrast; opening the mouth is the means by which the scent reaches the receptors. The answer is D.
